Footer.legal: All media belong to their respective owners and are used for educational, non-commercial purposes only. No tracking is performed. YouTube videos are embedded using enhanced privacy mode (youtube-nocookie.com).

YoutubePlayer.cookiesRequired: Accept YouTube cookies to watch this video.

consentModal.title: Cookie preferences
consentModal.description: JLPTExplorer saves your preferences locally and does not use tracking cookies. Video clips are embedded via YouTube in privacy-enhanced mode — YouTube may set cookies when you interact with a video.

necessary.title: Strictly necessary
necessary.description: Local storage is used to save your display preferences (language, theme). This cannot be disabled.

youtube.title: YouTube videos
youtube.description: Video clips are embedded via YouTube using privacy-enhanced mode (youtube-nocookie.com). YouTube may set cookies when you play a video.

SettingsDrawer.grammarBadges: Display format for grammar point badges below dialogue lines
SettingsDrawer.grammarFilterDescription: When multiple grammar points are selected, show scenes where they all appear:

HomePage.tagline: Japanese grammar in context — from JLPT N5 to JLPT N1
HomePage.demoExplainer: Textbook examples don't stick. Practice JLPT grammar points with real scenes from Japanese sources.

GrammarPointPage.noScenes: No scenes yet for this grammar point.
